scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/require-env.mjs DATABASE_URL && prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: node scripts/require-env.mjs DATABASE_URL && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.smoke:m001: npm run smoke:s01 && npm run smoke:s02 && npm run smoke:s03 && npm run smoke:s04 && npm run smoke:s05
scripts.smoke:m002-fixture: node scripts/require-env.mjs DATABASE_URL AUTH_SECRET SESSION_COOKIE_NAME SESSION_MAX_AGE_DAYS && tsx scripts/verify-m002-e2e-fixture.ts
scripts.smoke:m002: npm run smoke:s04-cash-order && npm run smoke:m002-fixture
scripts.e2e:m002: node scripts/require-env.mjs DATABASE_URL AUTH_SECRET SESSION_COOKIE_NAME SESSION_MAX_AGE_DAYS && playwright test e2e/m002-money-flow.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:m003: node scripts/require-env.mjs DATABASE_URL AUTH_SECRET SESSION_COOKIE_NAME SESSION_MAX_AGE_DAYS && playwright test e2e/m003-order-operations.spec.ts
scripts.verify:m001: npm run db:generate && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && npm run smoke:m001
scripts.verify:m002: npm run db:generate && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && npm run smoke:m001 && npm run smoke:m002 && npm run e2e:m002
scripts.verify:m003: npm run db:generate && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && npm run smoke:m001 && npm run smoke:m002 && npm run smoke:m003 && npm run e2e:m002 && npm run e2e:m003
